function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap and read finance lane AGENTS docs before invoice lookup; used exact invoice records and date boundary from user request.
function.outcome_justification: Invoice INV-0008 (issued 2026-01-19) includes 'staff follow-up support' line_eur 220, and INV-0011 (issued 2026-03-29) includes line_eur 160. The only other match is INV-0007 (issued 2025-12-21), which is before January 2026 and excluded. Sum = 380.
